title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Garry Tan's workflow for using Claude Code to ship large volumes of code while managing Y Combinator, extracting four strategies: assigning Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before coding. Marchese identifies one strategy as controversial and another as the key innovation.
